tool_summary: monday CRM is a customer-facing team platform built on the monday.com Work OS that provides sales pipeline management, contact and deal tracking, automations, and AI-powered capabilities. It aims to centralize the entire sales cycle—from lead capture to post-sale—within a highly customizable, no-code interface, enabling teams to close deals faster with less manual work.
key_features_raw: Customizable sales pipelines and deal stages
Contact and account management
Lead management and lead scoring
Activity tracking (calls, emails, meetings)
Email sync and tracking (Gmail, Outlook integration)
Mass emails and email templates
Automations (no-code workflow automations for task assignments, status changes, notifications)
Dashboards and reporting (real-time sales dashboards, forecasting)
AI-powered features via monday sidekick (personal AI assistant)
Agent Factory – AI agent builder for custom AI agents
monday agents – AI-powered autonomous workforce (Early Access)
monday vibe – build any app with AI
monday MCP (Model Context Protocol) for AI integrations
Quotes and invoices generation
Post-sale management and customer onboarding tracking
Document management (Docs, Forms via WorkForms)
Kanban and Gantt views for pipeline visualization
Integrations marketplace (200+ integrations)
Two-way data sync with external tools
Merge duplicate data and data enrichment
Custom fields and flexible column types
Mobile app for on-the-go CRM access
Team collaboration features (updates, mentions, file sharing)
monday campaigns – integrated email marketing
WorkForms for lead capture forms
WorkCanvas for visual collaboration
Enterprise-grade security and certifications (SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA)
roi_benchmarks: Customers report saving up to 30% of time previously spent on manual CRM data entry
monday.com claims teams can get up and running in minutes vs. weeks with traditional CRMs
Automation of repetitive tasks reported to save an average of 14 hours per week per team
Cited 50%+ improvement in sales visibility and forecasting accuracy for some customers
No-code setup claimed to reduce CRM implementation time by up to 80% compared to legacy CRMs
Customer stories reference 25-40% faster deal cycles after adoption

What would you like to manage? Professional services Real estate Software & IT Media & advertising Financial services Healthcare services Construction ‍ Other ‍ Get Started Get full access. No credit card required. Speed up every step of your sales cycle with AI Get Started Get full access. No credit card required. Scale your team with AI sales agents AI sales agents source, qualify and prioritize leads, and even book the meetings for you, right from your CRM, 24/7. Let your CRM do the busywork for you AI pulls data from calls, emails and files, updates fields and logs activities, auto-assigns reps and sets alerts. Turn calls into action with AI Notetaker AI Notetaker listens in on your calls and summarizes key points, suggests next steps, drafts follow-ups, and more. Stay ahead of every deal Spot every risk, priority, and sentiment before it’s too late, so you can act fast and forecast with confidence. Ask anything, know everything Ask AI about your pipeline, performance, team, or competitors and get instant, context-aware answers. Why monday CRM? Sell smarter 80 % increase in opportunity capture Sell smarter Make the most out of easy-to-use AI solutions for all your needs: from agents, to intelligence, automations, and more. Predict better 26X ROI from accurate data and consistent execution Predict better Spot risks early, track team performance, and forecast revenue with accuracy. Move faster 3,500+ hours saved by automating reporting and data entry Move faster Build a customized CRM without IT, automate admin work, connect all your sales tools - no coding needed. Your team will spend much more time selling Automations & workflows Close more deals by cutting the manual work Automate repetitive tasks like lead assignment, follow-ups, and activity logging to ensure your team can spend their time on selling. Get Started Code-free customization Adapt to any sales cycle in minutes Tailor your CRM with only a few clicks. Simply drag and drop deals, edit stages, and update processes - no hassle or code required. Get Started Reports & dashboards Get instant visibility to predict better Monitor rep performance and your team’s targets with easy-to-customize, real-time dashboards, so you can lead with clarity. Get Started Sequences & mass emails Maximize engagement with every contact Effortlessly engage with your audience across every stage of their journey with personalized, on-brand emails. Generate, trigger and track them with AI to make the most of every send. Get Started Mobile app Manage everything, from anywhere Enjoy a mobile experience that makes it easy to manage your pipeline on the go. Automatically log calls, check report statuses, and add new activities when you’re enroute, so you can move deals faster. Get Started Why monday crm? Describe the job. Your custom AI assistant is created, ready to work 24/7. Move faster 10 x Let AI create the ideal CRM tailored to your industry. Predict better # 1 Let AI create the ideal CRM tailored to your industry. Better results 95 % Allow AI to design the perfect Customer Relationship Management system specifically customized for your unique industry needs. From pre- to post-sales, in one place. Connect your entire revenue cycle Share complete information at every stage to ensure handoffs and feedback are smooth and accurate Manage much more than sales Involve legal, finance, and ops at just the right time, so approvals happen faster and deals never get stuck in handoff limbo. Increase sales with a built-in marketing platform Create, launch, and optimize marketing campaigns straight from monday CRM. Blog Knowledge base CRM academy Webinars & videos Events Guides CRM care Discover how efficient you can be with the right CRM features Take your workflows up a notch with CRM features that help you automate repetitive work, centralize customer communication, and organize your data in one place. Get closer to your customers Easily centralize, automate, and track communication with your customers Sequences Move deals faster moving faster with automated email sequences and task reminders. From lead nurturing to customer follow-up, manage it all without dropping any balls. Email composition Writing emails is easier and faster with AI-assisted email composition, advanced HTML editing, and customizable email templates. Mass emails Send personalized emails to prospects and leads in bulk to save time on manual work and make outreach more efficient. Activity tracking Stay on top of every interaction with advanced email analytics. See who opened or engaged with your emails, clicked links, and more. Performance tracking made easy Keep track of your pipelines, targets, and team performance Dashboards Access advanced CRM software features that increase visibility such as custom dashboards that instantly report your deal progress, sales figures, and team performance. Sales forecasting Set the deal value and close probability, then leverage reports to track forecast vs. actual sales, and drill down forecast by month, sales rep, and more. Activity tracking Access all your team’s activities, like calls and meetings, in one place to track their performance, understand their capacity, and plan ahead. Team goals Manage your team’s quota attainment over time, track wins and view goals for specific members or the entire team. Organize your data in one place like a pro Seamlessly connect all your new and existing data in one place Import your data Bring over all your existing leads, contacts, and accounts from Excel or through an API directly into monday to boost your CRM functionality. Merge duplicate data Receive alerts when you enter a duplicate lead or account, and eliminate overlaps by identifying and merging duplicate leads and contacts. Lead capturing Capture leads by integrating with your existing tools, by adding a form to your website, or simply by adding them manually when you reach out. Access your CRM anywhere, anytime Manage your sales process and client communications wherever you are Call logging Seamlessly log your calls with an automatic summary screen that suggests prebuilt quick responses Activity tracking Regardless of where you are, stay informed with instant access to past emails and activity on your phone. Contact management Access and manage your contacts from anywhere and send emails on the go, closing deals faster Win back time with no-code automations Use or create your own automations to do the manual work that steals selling time Manage your entire sales pipeline without switching tabs Learn more Unlock the power of monday sales CRM Get exactly what you need out of your CRM software with 100+ apps built specifically for monday.com Explore the marketplace Aircall Make, receive, log and manage sales calls, see contact info as a call starts, and access call history and notes in a snapshot. ﻿﻿﻿﻿ Learn more DocuSign Send documents for signature, store all documents in one centralized place and track agreement status in real-time. Learn more PandaDoc Streamline how you use documents—create, send, and track documents directly from your CRM. Learn more 150+ apps Supercharge your monday sales CRM with custom-built apps. Learn more Gain visibility into the entire sales process, from lead to close
